fields.description: Master switch for the */15 SO→DN release job. OFF = fully manual.
fields.label: Release Job Enabled

fields.description: Download + attach ClickPost label PDFs to submitted D2C DNs (*/15).
fields.label: Label Fetch Enabled

fields.description: When ON, the release job selects + logs eligible orders but creates NO Delivery Notes. Turn OFF to go live.
fields.label: Dry Run (select only, no DN)

fields.description: Only release orders whose every line has physical stock (actual_qty) at the source warehouse.
fields.label: Require Stock

fields.description: If ON, the release job stops creating DNs once the daily cutoff hour is reached (orders roll to next day). Default OFF = ship immediately.
fields.label: Enforce Cutoff On Release

fields.description: Daily batch cutoff hour (24h, IST). 16 = 4 PM.
fields.label: Cutoff Hour

fields.description: Sales Order name prefix to scope selection (Shopify D2C = SHP).
fields.label: SO Series Prefix

fields.description: How many days back to consider Sales Orders (by transaction_date).
fields.label: Lookback Days

fields.description: Max candidate SOs pulled per */15 run.
fields.label: Release Batch Size

fields.description: Hard safety cap on DNs actually created per run.
fields.label: Max Orders Per Run

fields.description: Comma / newline separated SKUs that ship in >1 box. These are EXCLUDED from auto-release and stay on the manual sheet until Phase 2. e.g. SOL-AF-501, SOL-AFO-501-JUC-121, SOL-JUC-121
fields.label: Multi-box SKUs

fields.description: Run the release job once now (respects Dry Run + gates).
fields.label: Run Release Now

fields.description: Build today's pick list + combined labels PDF.
fields.label: Prepare Today's Shipments
